institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Child Development & Family Studies — Birth-Kindergarten Licensure
tagline: Shaping the Earliest Years — Licensed to Lead
programDescription: The Birth-Kindergarten Licensure concentration prepares students for NC teaching licensure to work with children ages birth through kindergarten. Students complete extensive practicum hours in early childhood settings, learning developmentally appropriate practices, family engagement, and inclusive education. This program addresses the critical need for qualified early childhood educators, especially in underserved communities.
licensureExam: Praxis Early Childhood Education (5025) / Pearson Foundations of Reading (190)

careerOutlook.outlook: North Carolina faces a severe shortage of qualified B-K teachers, especially in rural and underserved areas. Licensed B-K teachers from NC A&T are in immediate demand with strong job placement rates and growing salary incentives from the state.
